channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Modi's party takes control of India's West Bengal in key state election
item.description: The outcome is expected to strengthen Modi's political position midway through his third term.
item.content:encoded:
The outcome is expected to strengthen Modi's political position midway through his third term.

(Image credit: Manish Swarup)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: A United jet struck a light pole and a truck near Newark airport, police say
item.description: New Jersey State Police say a United Airlines passenger jet struck a light pole and damaged a truck as it was coming in for a landing at Newark Liberty International Airport on Sunday.
item.content:encoded:
New Jersey State Police say a United Airlines passenger jet struck a light pole and damaged a truck as it was coming in for a landing at Newark Liberty International Airport on Sunday.

(Image credit: Kena Betancur)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: Supreme Court gives abortion pill mifepristone a 1-week reprieve from a major change
item.description: The Supreme Court says rules that allow patients to get the abortion pill mifepristone through the mail can stay the same for at least a week.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court says rules that allow patients to get the abortion pill mifepristone through the mail can stay the same for at least a week.

(Image credit: Drew Angerer)
item.dc:creator: Maria Godoy

item.title: The U.S. fights to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as UAE says it's attacked by Iran
item.description: The U.S. military said it battled Iranian forces and sank six small boats as it moved to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, while the United Arab Emirates said Iran fired missiles and drones its way.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. military said it battled Iranian forces and sank six small boats as it moved to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, while the United Arab Emirates said Iran fired missiles and drones its way.

(Image credit: Amirhosein Khorgooi)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: The many ways Trump wants to change D.C., from buildings to statues to parks
item.description: Many of the changes Trump wants to make to the White House and the city are facing legal challenges. Some are reversible, while others could reshape the nation's capital for generations to come.
item.content:encoded:
Many of the changes Trump wants to make to the White House and the city are facing legal challenges. Some are reversible, while others could reshape the nation's capital for generations to come.

(Image credit: Tom Brenner, Rahmat Gul, Mark Schiefelbein, Jon Elswick)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: Trump says U.S. will 'guide' stranded ships through the Strait. And, key Senate races to watch
item.description: President Trump announced that the U.S will "guide" stranded ships through the Strait of Hormuz. And, Democrats face an uphill battle to gain Senate control. Here are the key races to watch.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump announced that the U.S will "guide" stranded ships through the Strait of Hormuz. And, Democrats face an uphill battle to gain Senate control. Here are the key races to watch.

(Image credit: Roberto Schmidt)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Not sure what to get Mom for Mother's Day? Get ideas from our listeners
item.description: Mother's Day is Sunday, May 10. If you're stumped on what to get the moms in your life, get some inspiration from our audience. They share the best gifts they've ever received from their loved ones.
item.content:encoded: Mother's Day is Sunday, May 10. If you're stumped on what to get the moms in your life, get some inspiration from our audience. They share the best gifts they've ever received from their loved ones.
item.dc:creator: Malaka Gharib

item.title: Here's how medication abortion works with just one drug
item.description: The Supreme Court on Monday said that telemedicine access to the abortion drug mifepristone can stay — for at least a week. But as mifepristone faces court challenges, another drug that remains available is safe and effective at ending early pregnancy.
item.content:encoded: The Supreme Court on Monday said that telemedicine access to the abortion drug mifepristone can stay — for at least a week. But as mifepristone faces court challenges, another drug that remains available is safe and effective at ending early pregnancy.
item.dc:creator: Mara Gordon

item.title: At the 2026 Met Gala, 'Fashion is Art.' Here's what to expect
item.description: On the first Monday of every May, the rich, famous and well-dressed gather in New York City for the Met Gala fundraiser. Ivy Buck offers a lookahead - covering this year's theme, where to watch, who's coming, and more.
item.content:encoded:
On the first Monday of every May, the rich, famous and well-dressed gather in New York City for the Met Gala fundraiser. Ivy Buck offers a lookahead - covering this year's theme, where to watch, who's coming, and more.

(Image credit: Savion Washington)
item.dc:creator: Ivy Buck

item.title: How the SCOTUS voting rights ruling could affect Congress, according to Eric Holder
item.description: Eric Holder, chairman of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, talks with NPR's Michel Martin about a Supreme Court ruling that could pave the way for a drop in Black representation in Congress.
item.content:encoded:
Eric Holder, chairman of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, talks with NPR's Michel Martin about a Supreme Court ruling that could pave the way for a drop in Black representation in Congress.

(Image credit: Toya Sarno Jordan/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin
